title: Creamy Mexican Chicken Pasta
description: A creamy and flavorful Italian-inspired pasta dish with a Mexican twist. This recipe combines chicken, creamy sauce, and crunchy avocado for a delicious meal.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high heat. Add the chicken breast and cook until browned and cooked through.
Add the garlic powder to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the creamy salsa to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the cooked pasta to the skillet and toss to combine.
Stir in the crumbly feta cheese until melted and well combined.
Slice the avocado and serve on top of the pasta.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
